Description: Creates Route 53 alias records to point a domain/subdomain to a CloudFront distribution.

HostedZoneId.Description: The ID of the Hosted Zone to create the record in (e.g., Z2FDTNDATAQYW2).

FullDomainName.Description: The full domain name to create the record for (e.g., www.example.com or feature-branch.example.com).

CloudFrontDistributionDomainName.Description: The domain name of the CloudFront distribution (e.g., d111111abcdef8.cloudfront.net).

CloudFrontDistributionHostedZoneId.Description: The canonical Hosted Zone ID for CloudFront distributions (this is a fixed value).

RecordSetName.Description: The name of the DNS record set created/updated.
